notes: Smoke baseline measured during refactor. Production-scale baselines (M7B reference, rule-search throughput) need re-capture once a long-form measurement run is performed; placeholders below are intentionally conservative.
_m8_quick_note: M8 --quick (3 rules per source x 2 seeds x T=80 x 32x32x4x4) on cuda-batched + n_workers=30. Empirically ~8.5s; gate at 15.0s absorbs numba JIT cold-start variance and joblib spawn overhead in fresh subprocess. A regression past 15s indicates a real perf issue.
_m7b_reference_note: Spec target: 5 rules per source x 50 test seeds x T=500 under 30 min. Not yet captured at this scale on cuda-batched. Long-form gate (--perf-long) holds the slot.
_rule_search_note: Spec target: cuda-batched fitness throughput >= 20x numba baseline. The CA4DBatch primitive is in place but evaluate_rule_m7 was not migrated in Stage 3 (deferred). Gate cannot fire until that migration lands.
